programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: It's time to party! This war is all about building the perfect party pad for the backyard - the ultimate party deck. Two teams of professional deck builders face-off to design and build party decks - putting their professional reputations on the line in hopes of walking away with the Deck Wars trophy. Oren and Andrew are Team Black and BJ and Jeremy are Team Red. Who's going to pop the champagne? The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert, and host of Builder Boss, Jim Caruk.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: This is the ultimate of all ultimate Deck Wars! Decked Out's Paul Lafrance goes head-to-head against Leave it to Bryan's Bryan Baeumler. Two unbelievably awesome builders lay everything on the line to try and take home the Deck Wars trophy - and capture a lifetime's worth of bragging rights. Paul and his crack team from Decked Out are Team Black. Bryan and his great construction team are Team Red. The theme for this war is Freestyle - design and build whatever you want. Two totally awesome decks built in just two grueling days. The judges for this war are Income Property's Scott McGillivray, construction guru Damon Bennett, and Builder Boss' Jim Caruk. An epic battle for the ultimate victory.

programme.title: DIRTY BUSINESS
programme.desc: The homeowners have meticulously completed a contemporary interior renovation, while their backyard grows wild. Dirty Business host Joel Loblaw is enlisted to help this large yard reflect the newly modern indoors. Tight uniform plantings and a unique industrial application steel fence help the form of this space follow function and create a respite from the hectic world.

programme.title: DIRTY BUSINESS
programme.desc: A typical city backyard does little to help the family who lives there. Dirty Business host Kennedy McRae makes the most of this urban space, giving the young family a place to dine together al fresco and for the kids to blow off steam. It's a true extension of the home's interior, which is at once relaxed and casual for adults and kids alike.

programme.title: DIRTY BUSINESS
programme.desc: For these homeowners this "deal of the century" is anything but, as the backyard holds little more than a cement slab. Dirty Business host Kennedy McRae transforms it into adult-friendly space, complete with Zen fountain and chill space. But before any design work can begin the massive slab must go at a cost of thousands. This and the client's taste for high-end materials could add time and money to the bottom line.

programme.title: DIRTY BUSINESS
programme.desc: Six years of construction by both neighbours and finally this backyard can be used again. Dirty Business host James Dale renews this space, unifying it with the clients' own recent kitchen renovation. The use of existing trees, replacing an outdated circular brick patio and creating a space for young kids to play helps to meet the client's pent-up expectations.

Later, Rosemary works as a short-order cook and is flabbergasted to learn that her biggest order is cooking for her favourite Elvis impersonator. programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: John's a terrible cook. He can't even use the BBQ. Christine decides that it's time for John to be a man and learn how to grill. She shows him how to cook the perfect steak, and then takes him on an Oyster adventure — in hopes that he can prepare a surf and turf meal for his wife and friends. But before he can do that, Christine turns up the pressure and has him grill ribs for hundreds of people at an International Ribfest.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Jessica's idea of cooking is reheating frozen food. It's time for her to learn to cook -- and Christine is on the job. After Christine teaches her to make amazing Jerk Chicken skewers, they head out on an adventure to make handmade empanadas. With Jessica feeling a little more confident, Christine throws her into a huge challenge: prep, grill and serve seafood appetizers to over 200 VIP guests at Boy's Night Out. Later, when Jessica has to cook for her friends and family and the party size suddenly triples, can she take the heat?

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Vik's a doctor who never cooks. He either eats out or relies on his friends to cook for him. Christine decides that it's time this vegetarian doctor learned to cook for himself. She shows him how to make vegetarian staples, teaches him about the importance of herbs and then challenges him to prepare a fabulous dessert on a busy night at a top French restaurant. In the end, can Vik actually pull off a meal that will impress the friends who've been taking care of him for years?

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati sets out on the Sea of Cortez in search of the freshest, tastiest seafood Los Cabos has to offer. Along with Chef Guillermo Gomez of Cabo's luxurious Esperanza hotel, Pati reels in a fresh catch and heads back to the shore. Pati grills up her catch-of-the-day beachside with Chef Guillermo, as they discuss the evolution of Cabo San Lucas from small fishing village to vacation destination.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is invited to cook a Cinco de Mayo dinner at the prestigious James Beard House in New York. While in New York, she visits three Mexican-American culinary establishments around the city to hear the chefs' stories of using food as a way of pursuing their dreams in America, creating their own successful businesses, and honoring traditional Mexican recipes and ingredients.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Friends and family always tell Pati she has an extraordinary photographic food memory. She can recall a bite of a memorable dish from decades ago as if it were just yesterday. So, Pati decides to recreate some of her most favorite food memories in her own kitchen and give the stories behind the dishes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Culiacán, the capital of Sinaloa. Founded in 1531, Culiacán is the center of trade for produce, meat, and fish. Locals pride themselves on the produce cultivated from the land and nearby sea. Celebrated chef and culinary ambassador Miguel Taniyama takes Pati to the best markets, street food stands, and restaurants. In her kitchen, Pati creates recipes inspired by the experience.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Altata, Hidden Gem by the Sea of Cortez
programme.desc: Altata is a small coastal town with stretches of beautiful beaches. Pati meets locals and chefs as the town embarks on a journey to reinvent itself from sleepy fishing village to tourist destination. She takes a boat ride to sample fresh oysters right from the water and visits restaurants serving fresh seafood. At home, Pati prepares a seafood feast based on the bountiful waters of the Altata Bay.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati heads to Los Mochis, a coastal city in the northern region of Sinaloa that was founded by Americans in the late 1800s. After learning its unique history and getting an incredibly delicious tour of the street food, Pati returns to her kitchen to create two mouth-watering taco recipes that take her right back to those street stands in Los Mochis.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sinaloa's premiere resort town has 13-miles of beautiful coastline and some of the best restaurants in Mexico. But Mazatlán has overcome a complicated history. Pati meets two close friends, chefs Luis Osuna and Zahie Tellez – both witnessed the evolution of Mazatlán firsthand. They each give her a personal tour of the city, and chef Luis takes Pati to his family's restaurant, Panamá.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in El Fuerte, one of Mexico's "Pueblos Mágicos" or magic towns. Now a quiet colonial town, El Fuerte was the most important commercial and agricultural center in northwest Mexico for over 300 years. After a walking tour and a stop at the Hotel Posada Hidalgo to try their famous cauques, a unique local shellfish, Pati creates a few lobster recipes in her kitchen.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels into the mountains of Sinaloa to the tiny village of Jinetes. The small population of barely 100 people live on whatever the land gives them. Miles and miles removed from civilization, they've managed to preserve their customs and recipes for generations. Pati is the first visitor to come learn from their culinary traditions and they've prepared a feast fit for the occasion.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: El Chepe, Railway to the Past
programme.desc: The El Chepe railway is a historic passenger train offering stunning views of the Sinaloa countryside and the Copper Canyon. Pati rides the first section of the train's journey, from Los Mochis to El Fuerte, and tastes the gourmet offerings from the train's restaurant, Urike. Back home, the early morning train ride inpsires Pati to make a delicious breakfast based on Sinaloan classics.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Mocorito is known for one of Sinaloa's most beloved recipes: a slow-simmered pork dish called chilorio. Pati visits Victoria Gonzalez, a cook known for having one of the best chilorio recipes. Then she goes with Victoria to see her sister, Fabiola, who specializes in another Sinaloan classic, jamoncillo: a soft candy made of sugar and milk. In her kitchen, Pati perfects her own chilorio recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Celestino Gasca didn't exist until about 30 years ago and is becoming a vacation destination due to its magnificent beaches and idyllic surfing conditions. Pati meets restaurant owner Carmen and helps her cook an iconic Sinaloan dish: pescado zarandeado. Then, she travels to the nearby fishing village Las Barras to learn how to harvest percebes, a tiny crustacean considered a delicacy.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure
programme.desc: Nomads joins World Wave Sailing Champion, Kauli Seadi, and Maui local hero, Keith Teboul as they explore the beauty and mystique of Maui, as they prepare for the ‘Aloha Classic,' the final stop on the World Wavesailing Tour.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In The Birth of an Ocean we travel back to ancient time, telling the story of the ocean's turbulent beginnings, and its successive incarnations. It's a journey that introduces the enormity of the ocean over space and time – at four billion years old the ocean is nearly as old as the planet itself.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In our second episode, Footprints in the Sand, we take measure of humanity's impact on the sea since we first settled along its coasts over 150,000 years ago. We travel to the Mediterranean Sea with local Spanish fishermen in search of the magnificent bluefin tuna, the most prized fish in the ocean. It's also one of the most overfished. As fishermen try to maintain their centuries-old method of fishing, conservation scientists are desperate to find hard evidence to support their side in the heated debate over quotas.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: Episode Three of our series reveals the Mysteries of the Deep and takes us to the most beguiling parts of the sea, the very depths that we know so little about. As we improve our technological prowess, we are venturing deeper and deeper into the planet's last frontier. What scientists are discovering is beyond our wildest imaginings.

programme.title: One Ocean
programme.desc: In our final episode, The Changing Sea, we discover that the ocean is sending us clear signals. Off the rugged and beautiful coast of British Columbia we meet scientists and fishermen who are shocked at the recent arrival of a voracious new creature – the Humboldt squid. This monster-sized squid native to the equatorial waters of Mexico has moved north and ushered in a cascade of changes to the ecosystem. Their arrival is part of a disturbing pattern that is emerging with species movement being tracked around the world.

programme.title: On the Record with Mick Rock
programme.desc: Native Angeleno and multi-platinum recording artist Josh Groban takes Mick on an inspiring tour of Los Angeles, paying homage to the high school teacher who gave him the confidence to succeed, stopping by the after-school Shakespeare program he personally supports and treating Mick to a moving performance of his song, “Hidden Away.”

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Vs DeSantis
programme.desc: In September 2022, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis used an undercover recruiter to lure 49 Venezuelan migrants onto the island of Martha's Vineyard with a false promise of jobs and housing — a stunt which fueled a political and media firestorm. “Martha's Vineyard v. DeSantis” tells this story through the personal lens of four migrant cousins who now live on the Vineyard, and the lead attorneys and Texas sheriff who are aggressively fighting back against DeSantis and his cronies.

programme.title: Admissions Granted
programme.desc: In a landmark Supreme Court case pitting Asian American plaintiffs against Harvard University, activists on both sides wrestle with hard truths about race and equality, as the fate of affirmative action hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Battleground Georgia
programme.desc: Passionate voter engagement, followed by the fury of those who spread and believed "the big lie" were dominant narratives of the U.S. elections of 2020. Ahead of the 2024 election cycle, in this installment of the Turning Point series, Battleground Georgia becomes the lens through which to view the history of racist voter suppression, the power of grass roots organizing and the tension between old institutions and new ways of thinking about what a vibrant democracy could be.

programme.title: Serving In Secret: Love, Country, and Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: In 1970, Tom Carpenter graduated from the Naval Academy ready to follow his family's lineage in the military as a US Marine Corps attack pilot. Then he met Courtland Hirschi. Tom and Court fell deeply in love, keeping their illicit relationship a secret. At that time, homosexuality – if discovered – resulted in being kicked out of the military with a dishonorable discharge, a court martial, jail time, or worse… Tom and Court's story would be no exception. ‘Serving in Secret' features leading voices in politics, historians, civil rights activists, and retired military personnel telling the story of LGBTQ discrimination in the military, and the controversial compromise known as “Don't Ask, Don't Tell.” Tom's work towards its repeal along with many others was the Turning Point for LGBTQ+ rights, a fight that continues today.

programme.title: Jumpshot: The Kenny Sailors Story
programme.desc: From EP Stephen Curry, the award-winning film Jump shot celebrates the true story of Kenny Sailors, the forgotten basketball legend who introduced the jump shot, became a 2-time collegiate All American and NBA pioneer, revolutionized the sport for women, served as a US Marine in WWII, and then quietly faded into history. Featuring interviews with Kevin Durant, Dirk Nowitzki, and Bobby Knight. Directed by Jacob Hamilton.

programme.title: Hidden Beauty Of The Ugly
programme.desc: Ugly species have strange monstrous physical peculiarities such as menacing spikes, slimy skins, hairy legs, or intimidating eyes that fuel our fears and disgust. But looking past our fears, these repulsive attributes are the result of biological survival mechanisms that are essential to hunt, breathe, or reproduce.

programme.title: Hidden Beauty Of The Ugly
programme.desc: These repulsive species may have a hideous nose, a frightening sucker, an alarming appendix, a hooked beak, etc. These features that disgust us are all the manifestation of a unique evolutionary path that has been captivating the scientists who went to study them in the field. What needs do they meet?

programme.title: Wild Pyrenees
programme.sub-title: The Pirate Of The Mountains: The Bearded Vulture
programme.desc: Who are those brave, ready to face valiantly these snowstorms, this freezing humidity which never leaves you when it seizes you? They are golden eagles. Their wingspan exceeds two meters. Even from this distance, you can feel the power of the animal. Behind this royal dance hides the hunting instinct of a super predator. However, on the ground, prey is scarce at the end of winter. My eye is drawn to an aerial gathering. I can't count them all. They are vultures, the first raptors to be served on the remains.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: The California Coast
programme.desc: Calm your nerves and relax your senses with this ultra relaxing, super high resolution visual journey along the beautiful California Coast, from Redwood State Park at the northern tip, all the way down to San Diego. Several years of filming at locations around California have made this video possible. Filmed more than 10 years ago.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Yellow

programme.title: Morning Inspiration

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Black & White E1 — An extraordinary art collection that embodies timeless beauty and sophistication. Each piece, crafted with a monochromatic palette, reveals the exquisite interplay of light and shadow. From captivating landscapes to evocative portraits, these black and white images evoke a sense of refined elegance, transporting viewers to a realm of tasteful minimalism.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Places I've Never Been S5E1 — Dreamy travel photography, cityscapes, & faraway places.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Living Creatures E1 — Embark on a whimsical journey through an art collection featuring cuddly, furry friends, enchanting scaly creatures, and fantastical beings. Each piece captivates with its unique charm, inviting viewers into a world where imagination knows no bounds.
